ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "size_in_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the dataset (e.g., geospatial, demographic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_format FOREIGN KEY ("data_format") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Application identifier */,
  "dr" INTEGER /* Other relevant attribute */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "extension" TEXT /* File extension for the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the permission is for */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the rule belongs to */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation rule (e.g., range, format) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geospatial_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the tool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tool was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tool was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the integration belongs to */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool the integration is for */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., API, library) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES geospatial_tools ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., data usage, trends) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the collaboration is for */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., co-author, contributor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the history entry belongs to */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the data point */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_history_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)
